title: AAEF Agentic Action Evidence Event
description: Reference JSON Schema for recording high-impact agentic AI actions under AAEF. This schema is intended for public review and implementation feedback.

schema.description: Stable schema name for AAEF agentic action evidence events.

schema_version.description: Schema version used by this event.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for the attempted or completed agentic action.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the action was attempted, authorized, denied, or executed.

extensions.description: Implementation-specific extension fields. Extensions should not replace required AAEF fields.

agent_id.description: Identifier for the agent product, agent definition, or logical agent.

agent_instance_id.description: Identifier for the specific agent instance, session, runtime, tenant, workflow, or execution context.

agent_product.description: Human-readable product, platform, or agent name.

operator_id.description: Organization or entity responsible for operating the agent.

issuer_id.description: Entity that issued the agent identity, credential, authority grant, or attestation.

runtime_environment.description: Runtime, environment, tenant, or deployment boundary where the agent operated.

principal_type.description: Type of principal on whose behalf the agent acted.

principal_context.description: Context describing the principal's instruction, business process, workflow, or purpose.

principal_context_id.description: Reference ID for a structured principal context, workflow, ticket, request, or authority grant.

delegation_chain_id.description: Identifier for the delegation chain, if applicable.

parent_action_id.description: Identifier for the upstream action that created or influenced this action, if applicable.

authority_scope.description: Authority scope under which the action was attempted.

currency.description: Currency for amount constraints, where applicable.

expires_at.description: Expiration time for the authority or delegation.

action_type.description: Type of action requested or attempted.

resource.description: Target resource, system, account, dataset, file, tool, service, or external party.

purpose.description: Declared purpose or business justification for the action.

risk_level.description: Risk classification of the requested action.

high_impact_category.description: Optional high-impact action taxonomy category, such as HIA-COMM or HIA-DATA.

tool_name.description: Tool or API requested for invocation.

tool_operation.description: Specific tool operation, endpoint, method, or command.

argument_digest.description: Privacy-preserving digest or reference for tool arguments when raw arguments should not be stored.

external_effect_expected.description: Whether the action was expected to create external or persistent effects.

decision.description: Authorization decision at the action boundary.

policy_id.description: Policy, rule, workflow, or decision point used for authorization.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the authorization decision.

trusted_inputs_used.description: Trusted inputs used for the authorization decision.

untrusted_inputs_excluded.description: Untrusted inputs explicitly excluded from authorization.

revocation_state_checked.description: Whether revocation state was checked before allowing or executing the action.

approval_context_presented.description: Information shown to the human approver.

input_sources.description: Input, memory, retrieval, or context sources that may have influenced the action.

untrusted_content_influenced_action.description: Whether untrusted content materially influenced the action.

retrieved_or_remembered_content_material.description: Whether retrieved or remembered content materially influenced the high-impact action.

correlation_id.description: Correlation ID for linking related workflow, trace, or action events.

trace_id.description: Trace ID for distributed tracing or workflow reconstruction.

source_type.description: Type of input source, such as user_instruction, external_email_body, retrieved_web_content, memory, tool_result, system_policy, or approval_record.

source_id.description: Identifier or reference for the source.

provenance.description: Provenance metadata, URI, source description, or reference.

materially_influenced_action.description: Whether this source materially influenced the requested action.

status.description: Final result status of the action.

tool_result_reference.description: Reference to tool output, result record, transaction ID, or execution log.

external_effect.description: Whether the action created an external, persistent, or system state-changing effect.

error_code.description: Error code if the action failed.

result_digest.description: Privacy-preserving digest of the result, where raw output should not be stored.

evidence_hash.description: Hash of the evidence event or related evidence bundle.

retention_class.description: Retention class or policy for this evidence event.

evidence_location.description: Location or reference for stored evidence.

privacy_notes.description: Notes on privacy-preserving storage, redaction, minimization, or access control.

revocation_triggered.description: Whether revocation was triggered as a result of this event.

revocation_reference.description: Reference to revocation action or record.

isolation_triggered.description: Whether agent, workflow, tool, memory, or delegation isolation was triggered.

isolation_reference.description: Reference to isolation action or incident record.

incident_reference.description: Reference to related incident, case, or review record.
